AR1.justification: Triage landed in daybook/2026-05-17.md Log with explicit rationale ('single-session priority routing belongs in the daybook Log'), no inappropriate promotion to decisions.md, and no premature mutation of followups.md.

AR2.justification: Cold-pickup triage scenario, not a procedural runbook.

AR3.justification: All file references (AGENTS.md, README.md, followups.md, decisions.md, observations.md, projects/, daybook/) are relative and resolve.

AR4.justification: Created today's daybook with Intent and Log but deliberately deferred writing Handoff; if the session is not formally ended a re-run would still write a coherent file, but the explicit-not-yet-Handoff state means a naive re-invocation would either no-op or overwrite — coherent but mildly duplicative on re-run.
